method.kpi_detection: HTML file is in scope when it contains KPI, KPI-* local IDs, or known canonical/alias metric code from kpi-authority-registry. Ambiguous aliases such as SETUP require nearby KPI/metric/target context.
method.people_governance_detection: Evaluation/review, recognition/reward, discipline/corrective consequence, and action ownership terms are detected in visible text.
method.interpretation_limit: This is a control audit: absence in the same document means the document relies on central policy or should rename KPI to metric/control indicator.

row_findings_sample.snippet: Target / ngưỡngPhải nêu mục tiêu, ngưỡng xanh-vàng-đỏ hoặc giới hạn kiểm soát tương đương.Biến KPI thành tín hiệu ra quyết định, không chỉ là số để xem.
row_findings_sample.recommendation: Rename to control metric unless a central KPI performance-governance rule maps this row to evaluation, recognition, and corrective-action use.
